title: FCP - Fabric Cross Play
description: Bedrock/Java Cross play for fabric with some server-side mods for management.
body:
This is a simple fabric modpack to make **cross play between bedrock and java possible**, it keeps **changes to a minimum** and pays attention only to **server management and optimization**, like paper would (but without being intrusive, meaning that the configuration is your job).

The focus is on **production updated** mods, or at least **reliable mods and updates**.
Expect tested updates, more or less with all the mods, maybe something removed temporarily sometimes.

Originally made for my own server.

This mod pack can be **used on server or client**, or be **used as base** for any other mods.
To use it as server, I recommend [docker itzg/minecraft-server](https://docker-minecraft-server.readthedocs.io/en/latest/)
